title: Impacket SMB Server Payload Staging
description: This runbook operationalizes Impacket SMB Server Payload Staging using #impacket . It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments. Spins up attacker-controlled SMB shares for file transfer and payload delivery during ops.

metadata.descriptionHtml:
This runbook operationalizes Impacket SMB Server Payload Staging using #impacket. It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments.

Spins up attacker-controlled SMB shares for file transfer and payload delivery during ops.

  1. Prepare scope and access: validate target reachability and select low-noise execution order.
  2. Execute core workflow: run the command chain to produce actionable security outcomes.
  3. Validate and operationalize output: confirm results, capture artifacts, and prepare follow-on actions.
  • Tool Location/Source: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0xsyr0-OSCP/README.md:5651; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0xsyr0-OSCP/README.md:5652.
  • Attack pre-requisite: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 445.
  • What attacker gain: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
  • Detection/Defense opsec: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.

Core Commands:

impacket-smbserver share . -smb2support
impacket-smbserver -smb2support share <FOLDER> -user <USERNAME> -password <PASSWORD>
impacket-smbserver -ip 172.16.5.x -smb2support -username user -password password shared /home/administrator/Downloads/
metadata.commandsBlock:
